scrape_config.notes: Tricon Residential pattern (identical to The Selby). Availability sidebar > List View tab > paginated table. Prices show ranges for lease terms — extractor uses highest value.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(async function() { var rentTab = document.querySelector('a[href*=\"rental\"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a, button')).find(function(el) { return el.textContent.trim() === 'For Rent'; }); if (rentTab) { rentTab.click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 3000); }); } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(function() { var units = document.querySelectorAll('.unit-item:not(.unavailable)'); var text = ''; var seen = new Set(); units.forEach(function(u) { var t = u.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (t.length > 10 && !seen.has(t)) { seen.add(t); text += t + '\n'; } }); if (text) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'lnx-units'; div.textContent = text; document.body.appendChild(div); } })()

(async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } function click(el) { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("click", {bubbles: true, cancelable: true})); } function walkText(root) { var walker = document.createTreeWalker(root, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); var text = ""; var node; while (node = walker.nextNode()) { var p = node.parentElement; if (p && (p.tagName === "STYLE" || p.tagName === "SCRIPT")) continue; var t = node.textContent.trim(); if (t.length > 1) text += t + " "; } return text.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim(); } var allFpn = document.querySelectorAll("floorplan-navigator"); var fpn1 = null; var fpn2 = null; allFpn.forEach(function(f) { if (f.classList.contains("fpn-modal")) { fpn1 = f; } else { fpn2 = f; } }); if (!fpn1) fpn1 = allFpn[0]; if (!fpn1 || !fpn1.shadowRoot) return; var sr1 = fpn1.shadowRoot; var sr2 = fpn2 ? fpn2.shadowRoot : null; var floors = sr1.querySelectorAll("li.unit-filters__floor"); if (!floors.length) return; var allResults = []; for (var i = 0; i < floors.length; i++) { click(floors[i]); await delay(1500); var svgUnits = sr1.querySelectorAll(".unit--available-on"); for (var j = 0; j < svgUnits.length; j++) { click(svgUnits[j]); await delay(2000); if (sr2) { var detail = walkText(sr2); if (detail.length > 10) { var cleaned = detail.split("Enlarge")[0].trim(); if (cleaned.length > 5) allResults.push(cleaned); } } } } if (allResults.length > 0) { var div = document.createElement("div"); div.id = "collegewest-units"; div.textContent = allResults.join("\n---\n"); document.body.appendChild(div); } })()

scrape_config.notes: Tricon Residential pattern (identical to Selby/Taylor/Ivy). Availability sidebar > List View tab > paginated table.

scrape_config.extraction_hint: This site shows (1) building-level 'starting from' rents by bed type near the top (e.g. '1 Bedrooms from $2,750', '2 Bedrooms from $3,750'; Studios and 3 Bedrooms may say 'Fully Leased') and (2) a grid of floor plan cards further down. Each card has a unit-type code (e.g. A3, A5, A7, C3, C5), square footage, bed count, bath count, and an optional 'FINAL UNIT' badge. Cards do NOT show per-card rents. Emit one unit_data row per visible card, using the card's sqft/bed/bath and applying the matching 'starting from' rent as rent_price. If a bed type is 'Fully Leased', do not emit rows for it. Preserve the card's letter code (e.g. 'A3') in raw_text/notes. Capture the '$500 Signing Bonus + Up to 2 Months Free Rent' banner (on the homepage) as building-level incentive/promo text, not as a unit.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(async function() { var host = document.querySelector('floorplan-navigator'); if (!host || !host.shadowRoot) return; var sr = host.shadowRoot; var floors = sr.querySelectorAll('li.unit-filters__floor'); if (!floors.length) return; var allText = []; for (var i = 0; i < floors.length; i++) { floors[i].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles: true})); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); var waited = 0; while (waited < 2000) { var listing = sr.querySelector('.unit-listing__ul'); if (listing) { var t = listing.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (t.length > 10) break; } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 200); }); waited += 200; } var listing = sr.querySelector('.unit-listing__ul'); if (listing) { var t = listing.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (t.length > 10) { var floorLabel = floors[i].textContent.trim(); allText.push('FLOOR ' + floorLabel + ': ' + t); } } } if (allText.length > 0) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'diamond-units'; div.textContent = allText.join('\n'); document.body.appendChild(div); } })()
scrape_config.extraction_hint: This site has units across multiple floors. The pre_capture_js iterates ALL floors and appends unit listings in a diamond-units div. Extract EVERY unit from EVERY floor - there should be 80-120+ units total across all floors. Do not skip any floor sections.

scrape_config.notes: RentSync Levels view with floorplan-navigator shadow DOM web components (same pattern as The Diamond). Two buildings: Elm (#fpn-elm) and Ledbury (#fpn-led). pre_capture_js clicks Levels tab, iterates floor filters in each buildings shadow DOM, captures unit listing text, injects into body. Incentive: Up to Two Months Free.
scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } async function scrapeBuilding(fpnId, label) { var fpn = document.querySelector(fpnId); if (!fpn || !fpn.shadowRoot) return []; var sr = fpn.shadowRoot; var floors = sr.querySelectorAll("li.unit-filters__floor"); if (!floors.length) return []; var allText = []; for (var i = 0; i < floors.length; i++) { floors[i].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("click", {bubbles: true})); await delay(1500); var waited = 0; while (waited < 3000) { var listing = sr.querySelector(".unit-listing__ul"); if (listing && listing.textContent.trim().length > 10) break; await delay(300); waited += 300; } var listing = sr.querySelector(".unit-listing__ul"); if (listing) { var t = listing.textContent.trim().replace(/\\s+/g, " "); if (t.length > 5) { var floorLabel = floors[i].textContent.trim(); allText.push(label + " " + floorLabel + ": " + t); } } } return allText; } var elmData = await scrapeBuilding("#fpn-elm", "ELM"); var ledTab = document.querySelector("a.ledbury"); if (ledTab) { ledTab.click(); await delay(2000); var ledContainer = document.querySelector("#ledburyfpn"); if (ledContainer) { ledContainer.classList.remove("hidden"); ledContainer.style.display = "block"; var fpnLed = document.querySelector("#fpn-led"); if (fpnLed) { fpnLed.classList.remove("hidden"); fpnLed.style.display = "inline"; } } await delay(2000); } var ledData = await scrapeBuilding("#fpn-led", "LEDBURY"); var allData = elmData.concat(ledData); if (allData.length > 0) { var div = document.createElement("div"); div.id = "elmledbury-units"; div.textContent = allData.join("\n"); document.body.appendChild(div); } })()
scrape_config.extraction_hint: IMPORTANT: This property has two buildings — Elm (units labeled 'Unit NNN') and Ledbury (units labeled 'Suite NNN'). Extract ALL units from BOTH buildings.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

scrape_config.notes: GWL/RentCafe/Yardi site. Main page has plan-level sqft in data attributes (injected via pre_capture_js). Subpages have individual unit rents. Cookie popup auto-dismissed.
scrape_config.pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('[data-floorplan-name]').forEach(el => { const name = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-name'); const sqft = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-sqft'); const price = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-price'); if (name && sqft) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN DATA] ' + name + ' | Sqft: ' + sqft + ' | Price: ' + price; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; el.parentElement.insertBefore(div, el); } }); document.querySelectorAll('.fp-container img[src]').forEach(img => { const src = decodeURIComponent(img.src.split('/').pop()); const match = src.match(/(\d+)sf/i); const nameMatch = src.match(/lbg%20(.+?)%20\d/); if (match) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN IMAGE] ' + src.replace(/.jpg$/i, '').replace(/%20/g, ' '); div.style.fontSize = '12px'; img.parentElement.insertBefore(div, img); } });

scrape_config.extraction_hint:
This is a Peterson Rentals / Revolve Vancouver site. It has a main /floorplans page with plan CARDS, plus per-plan subpages appended after markers like "<!-- SUBPAGE: https://revolve.petersonrentals.com/floorplans/... -->".

MAIN PAGE:
- Each floor plan card shows: plan name (e.g., "STUDIO - G", "1 BDR - Z", "2 BDR - AE"), bed count, bath count, sqft (e.g., "602 Sq. Ft."), and either "Starting at $X /Month" + "Availability" OR "Call for details" + "Contact Us".
- IGNORE any plan whose card says "Call for details" / "Contact Us" — those plans have zero available units. Do not emit rows for them.

SUBPAGES (after "SUBPAGE:" markers):
- Each subpage represents ONE floor plan. It contains an "Available Units" section listing individual apartments:
  "Apartment: # 0205"
  "Starting at: $2,068/Month"
- A plan may have multiple apartments listed. Each "Apartment: # XXXX" line + its nearest "Starting at: $X,XXX/Month" line = ONE unit row.
- The subpage also states the sqft near top ("Up to 602 Sq. Ft." or similar) — use that for every unit on that subpage.
- The plan header on the subpage (e.g., "STUDIO - G (Below Market Housing - Conditions Apply)") + "Studio | 1 Bathroom" indicates unit_type + bathrooms.

EXTRACTION RULES:
1. EMIT ONE ROW PER "Apartment: # XXXX" LISTING in the subpage "Available Units" sections.
2. For each unit:
   - unit_type: from the subpage plan header ("Studio" → "bachelor", "1 Bedroom" → "1-bed", "2 Bedroom" → "2-bed", etc.)
   - bathrooms: "1", "2", etc. from the "| N Bathroom" line
   - square_footage: the integer from "Up to N Sq. Ft." on the subpage (e.g., 602). If not present, fall back to the main page card sqft for the same plan.
   - rent_price: the number from "Starting at: $X,XXX/Month" stripping $ and commas (e.g., "$2,068" → 2068)
   - rent_psf: rent_price / square_footage
   - notes: plan name + unit number (e.g., "Plan STUDIO - G, Unit #0205")
   - raw_text: short like "STUDIO - G #0205 — 602 sqft — $2,068/Month"
3. Do NOT emit rows from the main /floorplans cards — subpages are authoritative.
4. If a subpage is missing or returned zero apartment listings, emit nothing for that plan.
5. Ignore Cloudflare "Just a moment..." placeholder pages, recaptcha/form fields, leasing office address, and footer text.

Also extract any building-wide incentives (e.g., "Below Market Housing", "Limited Time Offer", "1 Month Free"). The footer note "*On Select Homes for a Limited Time. Conditions Apply." is a generic disclaimer, not an incentive.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

(async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } function click(el) { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true})); } function walkText(root) { var walker = document.createTreeWalker(root, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); var text = ''; var node; while (node = walker.nextNode()) { var p = node.parentElement; if (p && (p.tagName === 'STYLE' || p.tagName === 'SCRIPT')) continue; var t = node.textContent.trim(); if (t.length > 1) text += t + ' '; } return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); } var fpn = null, sr = null, floors = null; for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) { fpn = document.querySelector('floorplan-navigator.fpn-one'); if (fpn && fpn.shadowRoot) { sr = fpn.shadowRoot; floors = sr.querySelectorAll('li.unit-filters__floor'); if (floors.length) break; } await delay(500); } if (!fpn || !sr || !floors || !floors.length) { var errDiv = document.createElement('div'); errDiv.id = 'fpn-extracted'; errDiv.textContent = '[FPN-73-BROADWAY ERROR: not rendered after 15s]'; document.body.appendChild(errDiv); return; } var pieces = ['[FPN-73-BROADWAY floors=' + floors.length + ']']; for (var j = 0; j < floors.length; j++) { click(floors[j]); await delay(450); pieces.push(walkText(sr)); } var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'fpn-extracted'; div.textContent = pieces.join('\n---FLOOR---\n'); document.body.appendChild(div); })();
scrape_config.extraction_hint: This page lists units for 73 Broadway only (Story of Midtown). The pre_capture_js dumps each floor's units between '---FLOOR---' separators. Each unit appears as 'Unit XXXX' followed by bedroom count (e.g. '3 Bedrooms', '2 Bathroom'), interior sqft (e.g. '935 SqFt'), price (e.g. '$4,280'), and availability. The same unit may appear in multiple floor sections — extract each unique 'Unit XXXX' once. Ignore any 75 Broadway content (should not be present). Building name: 'Story of Midtown'.

This is the Signal (Vancouver) /suites page. The building uses a RentSync "floorplan-navigator" web component whose shadow DOM has been flattened into a plain-text dump starting with "=== SIGNAL PER-UNIT LISTINGS ===". The dump contains one line per available unit in the format:
  <unit #> | <beds> | <baths> | <sqft>
grouped under "FLOOR: <N>" headers.

Example dump lines:
  Unit 1 | 3 Bedrooms + Den | 2 Bathroom | 1429 SqFt
  Unit 101 | 2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathroom | 726 SqFt
  Unit 102 | 1 Bedroom | 1 Bathroom | 656 SqFt

SEPARATELY, the [PROMOTIONAL CONTEXT] block at the top of the content contains building-wide "Starting From Pricing" by unit type, e.g.:
  Studio: $1995 | 1Bed: $2160 | 2Bed: $2755 | 3Bed: $3900 | Townhome: $3735
(Exact dollar values change week to week — always re-read from the promo context.)

EXTRACTION RULES:
1. EMIT ONE ROW PER UNIT LINE in the "=== SIGNAL PER-UNIT LISTINGS ===" dump.
2. For each unit line:
   - unit_type: from the bed count ("Studio" → "bachelor", "1 Bedroom" → "1-bed", "1 Bedroom + Den" → "1-bed+den", "2 Bedrooms" → "2-bed", "2 Bedrooms + Den" → "2-bed+den", "3 Bedrooms" → "3-bed", "3 Bedrooms + Den" → "3-bed+den")
   - bathrooms: "1", "2", "1.5", etc. (strip "Bathroom"/"Bathrooms")
   - square_footage: integer from "NNN SqFt" (e.g., 1429)
   - rent_price: the matching "Starting From" rent from the promotional context
     - "bachelor" → Studio price (e.g., 1995)
     - "1-bed" or "1-bed+den" → 1Bed price (e.g., 2160)
     - "2-bed" or "2-bed+den" → 2Bed price (e.g., 2755)
     - "3-bed" or "3-bed+den" → 3Bed price (e.g., 3900)
     - Townhome → map to its bed count; use Townhome price ($3735) if a townhome label appears
   - rent_psf: rent_price / square_footage (e.g., 1995/440 = 4.53)
   - notes: plan name / floor / unit number (e.g., "Floor 1, Unit 101")
   - raw_text: short like "Unit 101 — Floor 1 — 726 SqFt — $2,755"
3. Do NOT emit rows from the promotional "Starting From" list directly — that list is ONLY used to populate rent_price on the per-unit rows.
4. If a unit has no sqft (rare), still emit the row with square_footage=null.
5. Ignore cookie banners, book-a-tour forms, leasing office info, and footer legal text.

Also capture current building-wide incentives (e.g., "Sign a 12-month lease and get a MacBook Neo*", "1 Month Free", or similar). The MacBook offer is valid March 20 - August 31, 2026.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

scrape_config.notes: Planpoint consolidated single view (Apr 2026) - section_clicks removed.
RentSync site (same as Parker). Floorplan cards with Check Availability modals. 12 plan types. Auto Load More handles Show More button.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('.modal-units__table, .unit-group-modal').forEach(function(el, i) { var text = el.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (text.length > 10) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[UNIT TABLE ' + (i+1) + '] ' + text; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; document.body.appendChild(div); } });

scrape_config.notes: TBD - URL and scraper config to be configured later.
RentCafe/Yardi (securecafe.com). Main page has plan types. Additional URL fetches all individual units. No sqft available.
scrape_config.extraction_hint: The ADDITIONAL PAGE section contains individual apartment units grouped by floor plan type. Extract EACH individual apartment (e.g. #B3-330, #B3-524, #4-13-03) as a separate unit with its specific rent. The unit_type comes from the Floor Plan header above each group (Studio = bachelor, 1 Bedroom = 1-bed, 1 Bedroom plus Den = 1-bed+den, 2 bedroom 1 bath = 2-bed, 2 bedroom 2 bath = 2-bed, 3 Bedrooms = 3-bed, Finished studio = bachelor). Do NOT extract the plan type summaries from the main page - only extract individual apartment units.

This site shows 8 floor plan TYPES only (Flat A, Flat A1, Flat B1, Flat B2, Flat B3, Loft A, Loft B, Loft C) with a STARTING rent per type shown as STARTING AT: $X / MONTH. Extract one row per floor plan type, setting rent_price to that starting rent. unit_count must be null (this is plan-type data, not individual unit listings). Square footage comes from the [SQFT REFERENCE] block; if a plan shows a sqft range (e.g. 450-520 sqft), use the AVERAGE. Bedroom mapping: Flat A and Flat A1 = Studio (bedrooms=0); Flat B1/B2/B3 = 1-bed; Loft A/B/C = 2-bed.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var elems = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < elems.length; i++) { if (elems[i].textContent.trim().match(/^Show All/)) { elems[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1500); }); } } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 2000); }); })()

scrape_config.notes: RentSync site (BGO). Card-based listings with Load More button. Same pattern as Elm Ledbury.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (function() { var sqftRef = []; document.querySelectorAll('[data-floorplan-name]').forEach(function(el) { var name = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-name'); var sqft = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-sqft'); var price = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-price'); if (name && sqft) { var parts = sqft.split(/\s*-\s*/); var sqftVal; if (parts.length === 2) { sqftVal = Math.round((parseInt(parts[0]) + parseInt(parts[1])) / 2); } else { sqftVal = parseInt(parts[0]); } if (!isNaN(sqftVal)) { sqftRef.push(name.trim() + ' = ' + sqftVal + ' sqft'); } var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN DATA] ' + name + ' | Sqft: ' + sqft + ' | Price: ' + price; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; el.parentElement.insertBefore(div, el); } }); document.querySelectorAll('.fp-container img[src]').forEach(function(img) { var src = decodeURIComponent(img.src.split('/').pop()); var match = src.match(/(\d+)sf/i); if (match) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN IMAGE] ' + src.replace(/.jpg$/i, '').replace(/%20/g, ' '); div.style.fontSize = '12px'; img.parentElement.insertBefore(div, img); } }); if (sqftRef.length > 0) { var ref = document.createElement('div'); ref.style.fontSize = '16px'; ref.textContent = '[SQFT REFERENCE] ' + sqftRef.join(' | '); document.body.insertBefore(ref, document.body.firstChild); } })();

scrape_config.notes: Elementor WordPress site. /apartments page lists all floor plans with type, sqft, and rent. Each named plan (CINNAMON, VIOLET, etc.) is a unit type. Server-rendered, no special JS needed.
scrape_config.extraction_hint: Each named floor plan (CINNAMON, VIOLET, ROSE, etc.) is an available unit. Extract each as a separate unit. STUDIO = bachelor, BED + DEN types should be noted (e.g. 1-bed+den, 2-bed+den). Sqft is listed. For rents with FROM prefix use the listed starting price.

scrape_config.notes: Tricon Residential pattern (identical to Selby/Taylor/Ivy). URL says cherry-house but building name is Canary Landing.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('[data-floorplan-name]').forEach(el => { const name = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-name'); const sqft = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-sqft'); const price = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-price'); if (name && sqft) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN DATA] ' + name + ' | Sqft: ' + sqft + ' | Price: ' + price; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; el.parentElement.insertBefore(div, el); } });

scrape_config.extraction_hint:
This is a QuadReal / RentCafe marketing site. The top of the scraped text has floor-plan CARDS (one per plan: A1, A3 2, B1, B1 2, B1 3, B2, B5, B6 2, B8, B9, C1, C2, C3, D1, Penthouse 2, etc.) each with a plan name, bed/bath, sqft, and a "Starting at $X / month" or "From $X to $Y / month" range.

BELOW THAT, under the marker "=== ARCHETYPE AVAILABLE UNIT LISTINGS ===", there is an injected plain-text dump containing EVERY individual available unit, grouped by plan. Each plan section looks like:

  PLAN: <plan name> | <bedrooms> | <bathrooms> | <sqft> | card price: <range>
  Available units for this plan: N
    Unit #909 - sqft 320 - rent $2,125
    Unit #1009 - sqft 320 - rent $2,125

EXTRACTION RULES:
1. EMIT ONE ROW PER INDIVIDUAL UNIT listed in the "=== ARCHETYPE AVAILABLE UNIT LISTINGS ===" section. Use the per-unit sqft and per-unit rent from that dump (NOT the card-level range).
2. If a plan has zero "Unit #..." rows in the dump (e.g., C3 "Call for details"), SKIP that plan entirely — it has no available units.
3. Do NOT emit extra rows from the top-of-page card grid — the dump below is authoritative for availability.
4. For each unit row:
   - unit_type: infer from the plan beds column ("Studio" → "bachelor", "Studio + Den" → "bachelor", "1 Bed" → "1-bed", "1 Bed + Den" → "1-bed+den", "2 Bed" → "2-bed", "2 Bed + Den" → "2-bed+den", "3 Bed + Den" → "3-bed+den", "Penthouse 2 / 2 Bed" → "2-bed")
   - bathrooms: from the plan bath column ("1 Bath" → "1", "2 Bath" → "2")
   - square_footage: the integer sqft from the unit row (e.g., 320, 457, 891)
   - rent_price: the dollar amount from the unit row with $ and commas stripped (e.g., "$2,125" → 2125)
   - rent_psf: rent_price / square_footage
   - notes: plan name + unit number (e.g., "Plan A3 2, Unit #909")
   - raw_text: short like "Plan A3 2 #909 — 320 sqft — $2,125"
5. Ignore Matterport/3D Tour links, navigation, and footer text.

scrape_config.notes: RentCafe/Yardi site (RioCan). Suite cards render client-side with Playwright. Scroll to load all plans. Each card shows plan name, bed/bath, sqft, starting price. CHECK AVAILABILITY buttons not needed - inline data is sufficient.
Tricon Residential pattern (identical to Selby/Taylor/Ivy/Cherry House). Maple House at Canary Landing.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('.modal-units__table, .unit-group-modal').forEach(function(el, i) { var text = el.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (text.length > 10) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[UNIT TABLE ' + (i+1) + '] ' + text; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; document.body.appendChild(div); } });

(async function() { var buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button'); var availButtons = []; buttons.forEach(function(b) { if (b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().includes('check availability')) { availButtons.push(b); } }); for (var i = 0; i < availButtons.length; i++) { availButtons[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1000); }); })()

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('.modal-units__table, .unit-group-modal').forEach(function(el, i) { var text = el.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (text.length > 10) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[UNIT TABLE ' + (i+1) + '] ' + text; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; document.body.appendChild(div); } });

scrape_config.notes: Tricon Residential pattern: Availability sidebar > List View tab > paginated table. Pagination is a sibling of .UnitsList, not inside it.

scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (function(){function w(n,d,m){if(d>m)return"";var r="";var c=n.children||[];for(var i=0;i<c.length;i++){var ch=c[i];if(ch.shadowRoot)r+=w(ch.shadowRoot,d+1,m);if(ch.children.length<=3){var t=ch.textContent?ch.textContent.trim():"";if(t&&t.length>1&&t.length<200&&t[0]!==".")r+=t+"\n";}r+=w(ch,d,m);}return r;}var el=document.querySelector("rhenti-listings");if(el&&el.shadowRoot){var div=document.createElement("div");div.id="rhenti-extracted";div.textContent=w(el.shadowRoot,0,5);document.body.appendChild(div);}})()

scrape_config.notes: SightMap embed. pre_capture_js fetches API JSON from __APP_CONFIG__.sightmaps[0].href (nested under json.data), formats all units with price as structured text. Fields: unit_number, area, price, floor_plan_id->bedroom_count/bathroom_count, floor_id->filter_label.
scrape_config.pre_capture_js:
(async () => { try { const cfg = window.__APP_CONFIG__; if (!cfg || !cfg.sightmaps || !cfg.sightmaps[0]) { document.body.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", "
ERROR: __APP_CONFIG__.sightmaps not found
"); return; } const apiUrl = cfg.sightmaps[0].href; const resp = await fetch(apiUrl); const json = await resp.json(); const d = json.data; const plans = {}; (d.floor_plans || []).forEach(p => { plans[p.id] = { name: p.name, beds: p.bedroom_count, baths: p.bathroom_count }; }); const floors = {}; (d.floors || []).forEach(f => { floors[f.id] = f.filter_label || f.filter_short_label; }); const lines = []; (d.units || []).forEach(u => { if (!u.price || u.price <= 0) return; const plan = plans[u.floor_plan_id] || {}; const floor = floors[u.floor_id] || "?"; const beds = plan.beds != null ? plan.beds : "?"; const baths = plan.baths != null ? plan.baths : "?"; const bedLabel = beds === 0 ? "Studio" : beds + " Bed / " + baths + " Bath"; const sqft = u.area ? u.area + " sq. ft." : "N/A"; const rent = "C$" + u.price; lines.push("UNIT " + (u.unit_number || "?") + " | " + bedLabel + " | " + sqft + " | " + rent + " | " + floor + " | Plan: " + (plan.name || "?")); }); const output = "=== SIGHTMAP UNIT DATA === " + lines.join(" ") + " === END SIGHTMAP DATA === (" + lines.length + " available units)"; const div = document.createElement("div"); div.id = "sightmap-extracted"; div.style.whiteSpace = "pre-wrap"; div.textContent = output; document.body.appendChild(div); } catch(e) { document.body.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", "
ERROR: " + e.message + "
"); } })()

scrape_config.notes: RentSync Levels view. All available units pre-rendered in DOM with .unit-item.available class. pre_capture_js extracts all available units text and injects into body.
scrape_config.pre_capture_js: (async function() { var units = document.querySelectorAll('.floor-container .unit-item.available'); if (!units.length) return; var allText = []; units.forEach(function(unit) { var name = unit.querySelector('.name'); var rent = unit.querySelector('.rent'); var beds = unit.querySelector('.bedroom'); var baths = unit.querySelector('.bathroom'); var sqft = unit.querySelector('.sqft'); var avail = unit.querySelector('.availability'); var parts = []; if (name) parts.push(name.textContent.trim()); if (rent) parts.push(rent.textContent.trim()); if (beds) parts.push(beds.textContent.trim()); if (baths) parts.push(baths.textContent.trim()); if (sqft) parts.push(sqft.textContent.trim()); if (avail) parts.push(avail.textContent.trim()); allText.push(parts.join(' | ')); }); var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'parker-units'; div.textContent = 'AVAILABLE UNITS (' + units.length + '):\n' + allText.join('\n'); document.body.appendChild(div); })()

scrape_config.notes: Tricon Residential pattern (identical to The Selby). Availability sidebar > List View tab > paginated table. Prices show ranges for lease terms — extractor uses highest value.

scrape_config.extraction_hint:
This page has two sections that must be combined to produce unit rows:

SECTION 1 — Starting-at rents by unit type (shown near top of page):
- "Studios from $2,525 From Level 21" → bachelor starting rent = 2525
- "1 Bedrooms from $2,900 From Level 24" → 1-bed starting rent = 2900
- "2 Bedrooms from $4,500 From Level 31" → 2-bed starting rent = 4500
- "3 Bedrooms from Level 31 Inquire for pricing" → 3-bed starting rent = null
(Exact dollar values may change week to week — always re-read them from the page.)

SECTION 2 — Individual floor plan cards (grid further down the page). Each card shows:
- A plan name (e.g., "A1", "A2", "A10", "B1", "B1 Mirrored", "C2", etc.)
- A sqft value (e.g., "488 sqft")
- A bed/bath line (e.g., "1 Bed | 1 Bath", "2 Bed | 2 Bath")
- Optionally a "RENTED" label

EXTRACTION RULES:
1. Emit ONE unit row per floor plan card in Section 2. Include RENTED cards as separate rows.
2. For each card, set:
   - unit_type: from the bed count on the card ("Studio"→"bachelor", "1 Bed"→"1-bed", "2 Bed"→"2-bed", "3 Bed"→"3-bed")
   - bathrooms: from the card ("1", "2", etc.)
   - square_footage: the sqft number from the card (INTERIOR sqft, integer)
   - rent_price: the Section 1 starting-at rent for the matching unit type (e.g., all 1-bed cards get 2900). If Section 1 shows "Inquire for pricing" for that type (e.g., 3-bed), set rent_price to null.
   - rent_psf: rent_price / square_footage if both present, else null
   - raw_text: short snippet like "A1 — 488 sqft — 1 Bed | 1 Bath"
   - notes: the plan name (e.g., "Plan A1") and "RENTED" if the card is marked rented
3. Do NOT emit separate summary rows for Section 1 — Section 1 rents are only used to populate rent_price on the Section 2 rows.
4. Skip any "VIRTUAL SUITE TOURS" or marketing sections — they are not floor plans.
